notes: Samantha should match Arts scholarships, entrance scholarships (Year 1), and need-based scholarships (opted in). Should NOT match Engineering or Social Sciences scholarships. No GPA filter applies since GPA is null.

demo_scenarios.description: R.C. Lee Hall (ss_414) and Chung Chow Hang Lan (ss_413) surface for Samantha but not Alex — financial need opt-in working
GBA cultural exchange programme surfaced from Xiaohongshu mock data — never appeared in HKU email
Agent explains no GPA yet and surfaces entrance scholarships available to Year 1 students
